deepReview.summary: Planning report compared current ETRNL behavior with GSD, Superpowers, GStack, and installed companion skills. Remaining implementation scope is limited to unimplemented deterministic evidence gaps.

sources.refreshCommand: fd -t f . && inspect listed repo files with line-numbered reads
inspect sanitized Superpowers snapshot skill files
inspect sanitized GSD snapshot workflow and reference files

skillMatrix.evidence: Plan saved under docs/plans with required headings and deep-stack artifact.
Findings report leads with current-state, comparison, gaps, and deterministic fix surfaces.

skillMatrix.trigger: validator, ledger, packet, and stop-hook source implementation
skillMatrix.evidence: Bounded simplifier pass checked touched helper functions and left explicit validators unchanged because they remain under the repo function-size cap.
Duplicate-function pass found the shared recordTaskEvidence helper already covers the new ledger evidence commands; no additional duplicate helper extraction was justified.

skillMatrix.trigger: TypeScript policy discussed but no TypeScript source edited
skillMatrix.evidence: Plan requires future source/diff trigger checks.
skillMatrix.notApplicableRationale: No exported/public types, contracts, validation, generated types, state machines, branded IDs, reusable type utilities, or cross-layer DTO/domain boundaries are edited in this planning turn.

decisions.reason: Current repo already has the artifact, ledger, packet, and hook enforcement surfaces needed for the remaining gaps.

completionAudit.evidence: Implementation added artifact validators, packet fields, ledger commands, execute stop statuses, skill/agent docs, health docs, and workflow tests.
completionAudit.reason: Implemented requested all-phases plan in source.

reviewPhases.disposition: Scope remains bounded to deterministic source enforcement and staged proof; no live install side effect.
Existing artifact, ledger, packet, and stop-hook surfaces were extended instead of adding a new state store.
Section validators and repair commands are documented for operator use.
Stop statuses fail closed for missing TDD, simplifier, reuse, type, and install evidence.
Skill and agent contracts name the deterministic fields and completion markers.
Implementation reused existing validators and added one shared ledger evidence helper.
New validators stay under function-size caps; explicit row checks are clearer than a denser generic abstraction.

tddEvidence.redCommand: tests/test-workflow-tools.sh before implementation slices with missing fixtures
tddEvidence.redFailure: Expected negative controls were added for missing TDD, reuse, TypeScript, and install evidence before implementation.

completionReconciliation.requestedOutcome: Deep-stack artifact schema validates review phases, TDD, completion reconciliation, reuse bindings, type triggers, and install proof.
Ledger and packet enforcement bind evidence to write tasks.
Execute stop checks detect missing TDD, simplifier, reuse, type review, and install proof.
Skills, agents, docs, coverage, and changelog align with deterministic evidence fields.
completionReconciliation.evidence: skills/etrnl-*.md, agents/etrnl-*.md, docs/skills.md, docs/health-stack.md, docs/control-plane-coverage.md, CHANGELOG.md

completionReconciliation.requestedOutcome: Source and staged gates pass; live install remains explicitly gated.
completionReconciliation.evidence: Final verification gate output and installProof rows in this artifact.

reuseBindings.decision: Extend existing surfaces and add a shared recordTaskEvidence helper for ledger rows.

sourceGate.evidence: tests/test-workflow-tools.sh passed 280 checks; tests/test-hooks.sh passed 331 checks; tests/test-install.sh passed 127 checks; shell syntax and ShellCheck passed; replay-hook-fixtures passed 8 fixtures; settings audits passed.

stagedInstall.evidence: scripts/install.sh --dry-run passed and reported planned install/backup actions without creating the target Claude home; tests/test-install.sh asserts dry-run non-mutation.

stagedDoctor.evidence: scripts/doctor.sh passed after install/rollback tests, syntax checks, prompt budget, skill contracts, settings audits, workflow health, and credential scan.

rollbackVerification.evidence: bash scripts/rollback-local.sh --dry-run passed and reported planned restore from backup id control-plane-install-20260602-183054 without mutating files; tests/test-install.sh asserts rollback dry-run keeps installed files in place.

liveInstallDecision.evidence: live install remains a separate explicit user request; accidental pre-fix install invocation was rolled back with backup id control-plane-install-20260602-183054 before PR prep.

riskTier.reason: Implementation touches hooks, scripts, skills, agents, and install-adjacent control-plane behavior; source gates plus staged install/canary/rollback proof are required before PR completion.
